nodes.label: AI as creative sounding board for alternative perspectives
nodes.grounding_span: AI shoots back something, and even if it's not really aligned with what the brand message needs at a particular time, it gives me ideas to keep in mind

nodes.label: AI as content infrastructure builder
nodes.grounding_span: I'm using AI for help with content infrastructure more than creative writing

nodes.label: AI ability to explain technical concepts at appropriate level
nodes.label_negative: AI inability to calibrate explanation complexity
nodes.grounding_span: I need a level of clarity and dumbing-down that it can't get right

nodes.label: AI as generator of culturally resonant content
nodes.label_negative: AI as generator of predictable, vapid content
nodes.grounding_span: it follows a predictable, formatted, and somewhat vapid list

nodes.label: Human creative instinct and perspective-taking
nodes.grounding_span: I am the creative and AI helps me organize different points

nodes.label: Authentic brand voice and audience resonance
nodes.grounding_span: things that really resonate with a specific audience

nodes.label: Strategic content infrastructure
nodes.grounding_span: content infrastructure more than creative writing

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI for content layout suggestions
nodes.grounding_span: I am satisfied with its suggestions for content layout on a landing page

nodes.label: Frustration with AI for technical walkthroughs
nodes.grounding_span: I am frustrated with AI's ability to walk me through website development

nodes.label: Preference for human creativity in cultural references
nodes.grounding_span: I'm much better at thinking of things that really resonate with a specific audience

nodes.label: Openness to AI takeover of graphic design
nodes.grounding_span: I'd actually welcome AI to take that over completely for me if it's able to

nodes.label: Iterative exploration of alternative perspectives
nodes.grounding_span: it gives me ideas to keep in mind... could be applied for something else at a later time

nodes.label: Strategic task prioritization based on feedback
nodes.grounding_span: the feedback I get... has led to me consider the timing of when I put out content
